title: Potamopitys brachysperma
intro: There is insufficient information available to write a paragraph about the plant Potamopitys brachysperma.
taxonomy: Potamopitys brachysperma is classified as a species of tree in the family Podocarpaceae. This family is commonly known as the yellow-wood or podocarp family. The Podocarpaceae family is part of the larger division Coniferae within the kingdom Plantae. Coniferae is further classified under the division Gymnospermae, which is a group of plants that produce seeds without an embryo. Potamopitys brachysperma is native to Australia and is often found in subtropical and temperate rainforests.
